rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER COREY ET AL VS. BROWNING PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Substitute Wayne Lanchester, Jr. As The Successor In Interest Of Deceased Plaintiff Wayne Lanchester Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 377.31
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFFs CHRISTOPHER COREY, WAYNE LANCHESTER and RICHARD MCVICKER's MOTION To Substitute Wayne Lanchester, Jr. As The Successor In Interest Of Deceased Plaintiff Wayne Lanchester Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 377.31 GRANTED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA S. CATRON VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion To Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, U.S. BANK, N.A. AS TRUSTEE, SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens GRANTED. No opposition filed. The action has been dismissed on August 4, 2017. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,155. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 601 FOURTH STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION and VALVERDE CONSTRUCTION, INC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, Amended Demurer noticed for October 2, 2017. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. KIM MCKENNA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT JASON MCKENNA's MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS GRANTED. This action is stayed pending the resolution of currently pending criminal matters. For the duration of the stay Defendant shall post (or arrange to be posted) $1,385 per month on the first of each month (or the next business day thereafter if the first of the month is Saturday, Sunday or holiday) in certified funds with the Court staring on October 1, 2017. Either party may appear ex-parte to lift the stay upon the resolution of the criminal matters or upon Defendant's failure to post to timely post $1,385. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. KIM MCKENNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Sanctions OFF CALENDAR. The action is stayed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VALSTOCK VETURES LLC VS. XIAN SITU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Discovery Responses & Deposition Of Pltf & Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT XIAN SITU's MOTION To Compel Discovery Responses & Deposition Of Pltf & Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Plaintiff to provide complete verified responses without objections to Special Interrogatories, Request for Production and Form Interrogatories within 5 days of notice of entry of order by hand-delivery. Plaintiff to appear for deposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $955 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLIVIA ANISCO VS. RAYMUNDO CARRASO LEON
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT RAYMUNDO LEON's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to allege all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLIVIA ANISCO VS. RAYMUNDO CARRASO LEON
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT RAYMUNDO LEON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Granted with leave to amend for plaintiff to properly verify the complaint. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRED DANFOURA VS. SANTOS VELASCO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2017 line 8. DEFENDANT SANTOS VELASCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege the date of inception of the tenancy in paragraph 6a and clarify under which law the rent has been increased from $600 to $707 in paragraph 6d (currently alleging "rent increased per law.") = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KY THAI VS. ANA MARIA LAINEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2017 line 9. DEFENDANT ANA LAINEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer (Notice is in compliance with SFRO and Rules and Regulations requirements) and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KY THAI VS. ANA MARIA LAINEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff'S Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Ana Maria Lainez In Support Of Defendants' Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 25, 2017 line 9. DEFENDANT ANA LAINEZ's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff'S Complaint; DENIED, whether defendants are subject to rights and obligations under the Lease is an issue of fact. Request for attorney's fees is not improper at this time. = (501/REQ)
